person_description: Reader primarily interested in the physical meaning of the two-sector decomposition and the final integrated result, not in the detailed derivation steps.
navigation_aids: In-text pointers to physical interpretation for each equation
required_prior_knowledge: Familiarity with momentum-space response functions and tensor decomposition in d dimensions.

person_description: Reader who wants to verify every step of the derivation, including the product-rule identity, sector decomposition, integration, projection, and limiting cases.
navigation_aids: Equation evidence mapping for each label
required_prior_knowledge: Tensor calculus in momentum space, product rule for differentiation, d-dimensional integration with cutoff regularization.

person_description: Reader or automated system attempting to reproduce the derivation computationally, requiring exact symbolic inputs, transformation records, and verification gates.
required_prior_knowledge: Computer algebra system (CAS) operation, symbolic tensor manipulation, SHAs for artifact verification.
